title: Emit 4-topic events (TransferSingle) directly via log4 opcode with inline data
description: ERC1155 TransferSingle has 4 topics (signature + operator + from + to) and non-indexed data (id, amount). log4 is used directly with pre-written memory containing the non-indexed parameters, avoiding Solidity's emit overhead. The data region is prepared with mstore before the log4 call.
pattern_before: emit TransferSingle(msg.sender, from, to, id, amount);
pattern_after:
mstore(0x00, id)
mstore(0x20, amount)
log4(0x00, 0x40, _TRANSFER_SINGLE_EVENT_SIGNATURE, caller(), from, to)
when_to_apply: Any event with 4 topics and fixed-size non-indexed data
when_not_to_apply: Events with dynamic arrays as non-indexed data (TransferBatch requires different handling)
